complaint: There's a loud grinding roar coming from the front passenger side that gets worse the faster I go, it sounds like the wheel is about to fall off and I'm scared to drive it.
observations: Cyclic roar/hum rises with road speed, changes pitch when swerving left vs right
Play detected at front-right hub when rocked at 12 and 6 o'clock
Tire tread even, lug nuts torqued, brakes within spec
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'front wheel bearing'.
